title: Korean-Style Jjigae Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy Korean stew made with a variety of ingredients. Serve with a side of rice for a filling meal.

ingredients.name: jjigae
ingredients.notes: use a Korean chili paste or gochujang

ingredients.name: dainty
ingredients.notes: any type of green chili pepper

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: use fresh ginger for the best flavor

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: use low-sodium soy sauce for a healthier option

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: use brown sugar for a richer flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use vegetable or chicken broth for extra flavor

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced chinese and cook until it's softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced jjigae and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, minced garlic, grated ginger, soy sauce, sugar, and rice vinegar.
Stir well to combine and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the jjigae hot over a bed of rice.
